zh.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn是Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn和Unknown的兒子，於1354年出生在艾歐洛。他和Unknown至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn是Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn和Unknown的儿子，于1354年出生在艾歐洛。他和Unknown至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Griffith,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griffieth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .
German: variant of   Greif   1.

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire):
habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).
possibly a variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffes
meanings: Welsh: altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffeth
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

variants.name: Griffth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffitt
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn was born in 1354, in Europe as the son of Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn and Unknown. He had at least 1 son with Unknown.

fr.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn est né en 1354, à Europe, fils de Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn et Unknown. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Unknown.

de.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn wurde 1354 in Europa, als Sohn von Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn und Unknown geboren. Er hatte mit Unknown mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn è nato il nel 1354 nel Europa come figlio di Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn e Unknown. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Unknown.

ja.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towynは1354年にヨーロッパでGriffith ap Einion Lord of TowynとUnknownの息子として生まれた。彼はUnknownとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn(은)는 1354년 우럽에서 Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Unknown(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn nasceu em 1354, em Europa filho de Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn e Unknown. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Unknown.

ru.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn родился в 1354 г. в местности Европа. Его родителей звали Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn и Unknown. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Unknown.

es.lifeSummary: Owen ap Griffith, Lord of Towyn nació en 1354, en Europa como hijo de Griffith ap Einion Lord of Towyn y Unknown. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Unknown.
